name: Sergeij Manthey
text: Very good haircut for fair price. The barber knows his business well. Professional, forthcoming and polite. Would recommend it to anyone.

name: Rafaëla Tijskens
text: Very nice experience for my husband! Perfect haircut by Ferdinando! Very professional, friendly and fair price!

name: Niko
text: Freddy is the man! Wonderful location and top service, best I've had in Greece so far!
